word: G2903 - κράτιστος - krátistos - krat'-is-tos - Most excellent

sections.paragraph:
- Original: κράτιστος

- Transliteration: Kratistos

- Phonetic: krat'-is-tos

- Definition:

1. mightiest, strongest, noblest, most illustrious, best, most excellent

a. used in addressing men of prominent rank or office

- Origin: superlative of a derivative of G2904

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: Superlative of a derivative of G2904; strongest that is (in dignity) very honorable: - most excellent (noble).
